props.message:
Wyrdkin Glade.

The wyrdkin sleep beneath the great trees, and Glim flickers at your shoulder. South, beyond the elder pines, the path runs to the Wyrdwood.
Glim chimes once, gently. "You can read what's left of the Source by Sight," she says, "but only one Sigil can pass it on. We carry that one."

A wyrdkin-stone, cool to the touch.

"Lirien's roots reach here. The Source whispers in the leaves — listen, and you may hear your own name spoken back."

props.open_message: A heart-flower, pressed in oilcloth. The Source thanks you.
A Fairy Bottle. The fae hide a spark of life inside — it'll catch you once if a blow would have laid you low.
A yew longbow, oiled and strung. Press F to draw and loose. Find arrows in quivers along the path.
A forked slingshot. Press F to fling a seed at speed.
A small bag of dry deku-seeds.

root.speaker: Old Hesper
root.text: Welcome to the Glade, little one. I am Hesper, oldest of the keepers here. The wyrdkin sleep, and we tend their dreaming. You wake into a strange hour. Will you sit, and learn?

choices.label: What is the Sigil of Sharing?

realm.speaker: Old Hesper
realm.text: This is Lirien's weave. Forest, brook, kiln, and stone — all spun from the Source. The Maker gave; the Hoarder takes. The balance has tipped, and so the wardstones thin. That is why you are here.

choices.label: What is the Sigil of Sharing?

sigil.speaker: Old Hesper
sigil.text: Three sigils mark the Triglyph — Sight, Shaping, Sharing. Yours is the third. To share is to refuse the hoard; to refuse the hoard is to be the answer to Khorgaul. Carry it gently. Carry it bright.

glim.speaker: Old Hesper
glim.text: A wisp — a fleck of the Source given a small, brave will. She has chosen you, and that is no small thing. Where you are dim, Glim brightens. Where you forget, Glim remembers.

go.speaker: Old Hesper
go.text: North, through the wyrdwood. Past the fork, past the ribbon, into the Hollow. You will know it when you see it. The road from there is yours to find.

bye.speaker: Old Hesper
bye.text: Walk in the green. Walk under the wing of Lirien.

root.speaker: Little Pip
root.text: Are you the wanderer? Hesper said a wanderer would come. Are you going north? You should go north! The wyrdwood is north!

two.speaker: Little Pip
two.text: I'm not allowed to go past the marker stone. But you can! Go on! The trees there know secrets. I think they whisper them to wisps. Maybe Glim already knows!

props.open_message: A piece of heart, pressed deep into a thicket of wyrdkin-bramble. Glim says the bushes were planted to hide it.

props.message: A leaf-curtain stirs against the wall — there is a hollow behind it.

root.speaker: Glim
root.text: *The little wisp pulses, gentle and curious.* You hear me, don't you. The Source still moves through you. Good.

teach.speaker: Glim
teach.text: Listen — and remember. *up... right... down... left... up.* Carry it. Hum it at any owl-shrine and the keepers will tend you. *[Z] to hum.*

remembered.speaker: Glim
remembered.text: Yes. The melody's in you now. The Source remembers what you remember.

bye.speaker: Glim
bye.text: *Glim drifts a little higher and waits.*

props.warp_message: The wyrdkin breathe slow. The Glade remembers your shape.

props.message:
Welcome to the Wyrdmark.
[WASD] to move. [Space] to jump.

[J] to swing your blade.
Hold to charge.
[E] to read signs, open chests, speak to kin.
[Esc] to pause. The pause menu has Items, Songs, and the World Map.
[Q] to lock onto an enemy. Tap again to release. (Once you have learned a song, [Z] to hum it.)
Glim is in this glade. Speak with him.
